title: Cross-Repo Write Exceptions
description: Per-anchor list of repository name patterns exempt from the cross-repo write convention. Consumed by cross-repo-write-guard.ps1 to decide which sibling repos an anchor session may edit directly without the cross-repo-editor sub-agent.

$schema.description: URL of this schema, enabling editor autocomplete and validation.

version.description: Schema version of this exceptions file. Currently always 1.

exceptions.description: The exempt-repo entries. An empty array means no exceptions are declared.

pattern.description: Repository name (or name fragment) this exception applies to, matched against the target repo of a cross-repo write.

reason.description: Why direct writes to this repo are exempt from the cross-repo convention. Stated so a future reader can judge whether the exemption still holds.

added.description: ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) the exception was added. Optional.

issue.description: Issue reference that justifies or tracks the exception, e.g. 'DG/DotFiles#147'. Optional.
